sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83093" key="piqhkideu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῐθηκ-ῐδεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">young ape</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:7:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
